picks.quote: Ronda's going to come out there, slip a jab, grab her, headlock, toss her to the ground, and armbar, probably in the first round.
this is going to be another one-sided fight for Francis Ngannou.
Justin Gaethje doesn't get mopped very often. Go a good calf kick. Couple calf kicks changes the fight.
this long, long guy throws things down the middle, jumps in the nasty knees... It's a dangerous fight for Michael Chandler.
